settings.text: Here is a cool subtitle text for us to text
Here is a cool subtitle text for us to text
Is it a number of applications game, or a networking game? Where is your focus and where are you seeing the best results?
How much flexibility / room for negotiation is out there currently? For example, is there the potential to maybe work 4 days instead of 5 for the right candidate or to be mostly remote?

I’ve heard mixed answers about resumes being scanned by AI before actually getting to a human in HR. I have a nicely designed resume (as a designer I feel this is par for the course) but could that be harming my job search?
